stemHtml: What types of cloud will you see flying at FL 50 towards a warm front?

options.a: At some 800 km CS, later AS, and at some 300 km NS until the front
options.b: Mainly clear skies. At some 100 km from the front NS begins
options.c: At some 500 km AS, later CS and at some 80 km before the front CB
options.d: At some 500 km from the front, groups of CB, later at some 250 km thickening AS
